# UC-11.7.8 · Asterisk Full Log Dialplan Context Error Rate

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Fault, Operations &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We watch this Asterisk system’s calls and health, so trunks, queues, and voicemail stay in shape for everyday use.*

---

## Description

Dialplan errors spike after module upgrades or AGI database failures. Share by context isolates the broken macro or subroutine quickly.

## Value

Reduces unexplained call failures and speeds rollback decisions.

## Implementation

(1) Noise-filter music-on-hold chatter. (2) Baseline per context. (3) Alert on 3x baseline. (4) Pair with Git history.

## SPL

```spl
index=voip sourcetype="asterisk:full" earliest=-24h
| where match(_raw, "(?i)WARNING|ERROR") AND match(_raw, "(?i)dialplan|app_|pbx_|Goto|Extension")
| eval context=coalesce(context, CONTEXT, "unknown")
| stats count by context
| eventstats sum(count) as tot
| eval err_share_pct=round(100*count/tot,3)
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Bar by context; timechart error rate.

## Known False Positives

Dialplan changes, new IVR, and one-off test calls that create benign parse noise during cutover.
